target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-e15d7e0c
standouts: target uses a board:// URI scheme
file contains only metadata, no payload

References external entities with a URI-style identifier

concerns: No payload or context beyond the link itself
The meaning of 'board_items' attachment_type is not defined in the file

notes: A minimal, timestamped metadata stub that links a channel memory attachment to a board item via a board:// URI.
